title: Workhorse Highlights Achievements in 2023 Year-End Letter to Shareholders
text:
Workhorse Highlights Achievements in 2023 Year-End Letter to Shareholders

Date: December 21, 2023

Key Quote

We are ending the year with important momentum. We have final vehicle assembly up and running for four new product lines, the W4CC cab chassis, the W750, and the W56 stripped chassis and step van.

Summary

CEO Rick Dauch's shareholder letter emphasizes the company's progress navigating production challenges and resolving supply chain issues during 2023. The firm highlighted manufacturing improvements at its Union City facility, expanded dealer networks, and recent wins including fleet orders and government incentive approvals across multiple states.
